channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: "Boswell Close" low level twin post mounted street/road name sign damaged and laying on pavement. Posts also damaged. Possible vehicle impact damage., 2nd May
item.description:
As above.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Boswell Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage Leakage, 2nd May
item.description:
34 London Rd, Bromley, BR1 3QR. There is this sewage leakage leaking down from the complex next to the place pinned with strong bad odour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, London Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This car has not moved for more than 21 days, 2nd May
item.description:
It’s a nice car that has never been in the area until it was parked in the current position in Hay st. It hasn’t moved at all since it arrived here probably about a month ago. I wondered if it was stolen and then dumped. It’s quite odd

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hay Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: M and s trolley by bromley north sign, 2nd May
item.description:
Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tweedy Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There is a massive pothole, 2nd May
item.description:
The pothole is huge please sort
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115-119, Leontine Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped sofa, 2nd May
item.description:
Sofa on street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 76-78, Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed base, electrical, broken glass, on Astbury Road, 1st May
item.description:
Two parts of a bed base, small electrical equipment and a lot of broken glass on Astbury Road, by the entrance to Regal Row.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Regal Row, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various damaged playground equipment, 1st May
item.description:
Broken slide

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various damaged playground equipment, 1st May
item.description:
Damaged slide, climbing ropes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynmouth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Concrete manhole cover broken with exposed gap, 1st May
item.description:
Noticed today 1st may 2026 whilst walking my dog so not sure how long it has been broken but looking very dangerous anyone could fall in
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged equipment, 1st May
item.description:
We really do need CCTV installed for the protection of this park. The damaged being caused will only escalate again and cause £1000’s to the council. Invest in CCTV instead. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting desperately, 1st May
item.description:
Children are struggling to play, dog mess is hidden and the unevenness of the ground is tripping up small toddlers at nursery collection and drop off times. Please attend sooner than later scheduled. Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 82, Doveney Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes in thames, 1st May
item.description:
Bikes in river south bank

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfriars Underpass, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pathway, 1st May
item.description:
A local resident has now attempted to trim this back as it is blocking the pathway. It needs a thorough prune and to open the walkway back up before the bees nest reappears like last year. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Buttermere Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous oxide cylinders dumped, 1st May
item.description:
Reported before that 2 nitrous oxide cylinders dumped under my car wheels at 82 Lakedale Rd. Have put in box on pavement as dangerous if put in black bin. Other rubbish is now dumped in box. Please can someone collect.Thanks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lakedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no 12., 1st May
item.description:
Streetlight is twisted so the the light shines directly into our bedroom. This happened a few days ago. The light is so bright that it is stopping us sleep. The light needs to be switched off or repaired.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Frognal Lane, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 1st May
item.description:
Same issue, different day!!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old armchair, 1st May
item.description:
Been dumped for few weeks
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bromhedge, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large TV dumped, 1st May
item.description:
Large TV put into communal bins. Been removed by residents and put in the bin shed as incorrectly disposed of
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Elm Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Porsche on Long Street, 1st May
item.description:
Porsche Taycan has been left abandoned for approx 4 months at the intersection of Long and Waterson street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Long Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
